nasb.text: Aaron said, “Do not let the anger of my lord burn; you know the people yourself, that they are prone to evil.

esv.text: And Aaron said, “Let not the anger of my lord burn hot. You know the people, that they are set on evil.

cnv.text: 亞倫回答：“求我主不要發烈怒，你知道這人民傾向罪惡。

ccb.text: 亚伦回答说：“求我主不要动怒，你知道这些人专门作恶。
